Preterit.turoyo: hat ʕal d-aṯət w-mxabállux-li w-lə=tlelux meni, qum izúx mobel-e l-ruḥux, w-məṯnáḥ m-u=taʕb-ano
translations:
Since
			you have come, have reported [this] to me and have not hidden
			yourself from me, go and take [the treasure] and rest from this
			trouble

Imperative.turoyo: izolux mxabár ḥoli, amár k-aṯi Naro!
translations:
geh
			und benachrichtige meinen Onkel, sage: Naro ist gekommen
